Plaintiff Hayman Brothers Inc., is present. Represented by Jeff Lance
Attorney,Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Esperanza Mesa, are present.
Attorney, Jeremy Reyes, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed

This case settled, the trial date of Mar-01-2010 is vacated.
